content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To     : Opinion Request meeting participants          Date  : Mar. 31, 1978


From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Barbara Campbell

Subject: Item for discussion.


Are there any variations which can be made by a committee
which reports numerous non-monetary contributions from a
single contributor in light of the requirements of
Government Code Section 84210(g)?

There was general discussion but no conclusion
was reached. It was agreed that a committee
could not just attack G.C. §84300 notices.

sections.question: Are there any variations which can be made by a committee which reports numerous non-monetary contributions from a single contributor in light of the requirements of Government Code Section 84210(g)?
sections.question_synthetic: The memorandum asks whether committees have flexibility in reporting multiple non-monetary contributions from a single contributor under Government Code Section 84210(g).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an internal memorandum to opinion request meeting participants, not a formal advice letter response. No definitive conclusion was reached. The document discusses Government Code Section 84210(g) and confirms that committees cannot simply attach G.C. §84300 notices.
